title: ExcelJS is unable to read rich text format at the beginning of a sentence.
author: irhamnurullah
body: ExcelJS is unable to read rich text format at the beginning of a sentence. If within a cell, there is a sentence 'here underline' with the word 'here' formatted as underline, this is not detected, and it will only be detected as underlined when a space is added before the word 'here'.
